ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "household_name" TEXT /* Name of the household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the household */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the household */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the household */,
  "floor_plan_description" TEXT /* Floor plan description of the household */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the household (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the trait is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trait was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the device type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the device is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the device is assigned to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being assigned */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location within the household */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was assigned */,
  "installation_technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who installed the device */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the assignment is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_assignments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "floor_level" INTEGER /* Floor level of the location */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the location is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_trait_assignments" (
  "trait_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait assignment */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the trait is assigned to */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the trait assignment is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_trait_assignments_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_trait_assignments_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES household_traits ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, technician, household owner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is currently active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., JSON array of permissions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
